text: {player1}: show the group your most recent photo. Explain it or drink {medium}.
Most controversial opinion wins. Group votes — worst take drinks {small}.
{player1}: read your last DM out loud, or drink {max}.
Hot takes round. Go clockwise — weakest take drinks {medium}.
{player1}: rank everyone by how wild their night would be without inhibitions.
Everyone confesses their most chaotic life decision. Group picks the wildest — they pour a round for everyone.
{player1}: what is the shadiest thing you have ever done? No lying. Drink {sip} first for courage.
Group vote: who is most likely to be a secret millionaire? That person gives out {medium}.
Drink {sip} if your current partner is the best in bed you've ever had. (If they're not — we advise you to pretend!)
Drink {sip} if your last ex was the best in bed you've ever had.
Drink {small} if you've ever had multiple situationships at the same time.
Drink {small} if you've ever hooked up with someone you met through a dating app.
Take as many sips as there are people in this room you'd consider sleeping with.
Drink {small} if you've ever measured yourself or a partner. You know what we mean.
{player1}: take {sip} and let {player2} roast you for 30 seconds.
PUNISHMENT — {player1}: take {max} while everyone insults you for 30 seconds.
The three players voted most stupid take {large}. If you can't reach a majority, {player1} decides.
Everyone pick a new nickname for {player1} — make it dirty, insulting, whatever. Until the end of the night, everyone must use it.
{player1}: who do you think has the face most out of proportion here? They take {small}.
PICONARY! {player1}: draw something ridiculous. Ask a stranger to guess what it is. If they get it, give out {small}. If not, you take them.
{player1}: go barefoot and go ask a stranger for some ice, or take {large}.
The last player to shout "{player1}, lick my balls!" takes {max}.
If you've ever taken a dump at a nightclub — {take_or_give_small}.
{player1}: let another player write whatever they want on your forehead with a pen, or take {large}.
If you've ever slept with someone and then forgot their name — {take_or_give_small}.
If you and another player here have ever slept with the same person — both take {medium}.
{player1}: get on all fours and let every player give you one spank, or take {max}.
BOGIES! {player1} must approach a stranger and say 'bogies' progressively louder until they reach a shout. Refuse and take {large}.
{player1} must shout something of the group's choosing — group decides right now. Refuse and take {large}.
{player1}: flirt with {player2} for 30 seconds straight. Group votes if it was convincing — if not, take {medium}.
{player1} and {player2}: play the tortilla slap game. Slap each other with a tortilla until one gives up. Loser takes {large}.
If you've ever had sex on public transport — {take_or_give_small}.
If you've slept with 2 different people on the same day — {take_or_give_small}.
SPIN THE BOTTLE! Everyone sits in a circle. {player1} spins. Whoever it lands on must take {medium}. They spin next.
{player1}: get on {player2}'s back and ride them like a horse across the room. {sip} each on refusal.
{player1}: draw a monobrow on your face right now or take {medium}.
Take {sip} for every testicle you have. Own it.
If you've ever spit on someone — {take_or_give_small}.
Vote on the biggest scaredy cat of the group. They take {medium}.
If you didn't bring food or drink to this party — take {medium}.
{player1}: rank the group from most to least likely to survive a zombie apocalypse. Last place drinks {large}.
Most unhinged group confession round. Wildest story pours a round for everyone.
{player1}: what’s the pettiest thing you’ve ever done for revenge? Tell us or drink {max}.
Group vote: who here is most likely to go viral for the wrong reasons? They drink {large}.
{player1}: describe your most embarrassing wardrobe malfunction in detail or drink {max}.
{player1}: rank the group from most to least chaotic when drunk. Last place drinks {large}.
{player1}: what’s the most ridiculous lie you’ve told to get out of something? Tell or drink {max}.
Group vote: who here is most likely to start a dance circle? They give out {medium}.
